bg.name: Background
bg.description: Maze background, full-bleed behind the board.

wall.name: Maze walls
wall.description: Color of the maze wall tiles.

pellet.name: Dots
pellet.description: Color of the dots the runner eats.

power.name: Power dots
power.description: Color of the larger power dots.

art_runner.name: Runner sprite
art_runner.description: Override the runner (capuchin) sprite. Omit to keep the default monkey.

art_chaser_1.name: Chaser 1 sprite
art_chaser_1.description: Override the first chaser sprite. Omit to keep the default frog.

art_chaser_2.name: Chaser 2 sprite
art_chaser_2.description: Override the second chaser sprite. Omit to keep the default parrot.

art_chaser_3.name: Chaser 3 sprite
art_chaser_3.description: Override the third chaser sprite. Omit to keep the default snake.

art_chaser_4.name: Chaser 4 sprite
art_chaser_4.description: Override the fourth chaser sprite. Omit to keep the default sloth.

art_banana.name: Dot sprite
art_banana.description: Override the collectible dot sprite. Omit to keep the procedural banana.

art_coconut.name: Power dot sprite
art_coconut.description: Override the power-dot sprite. Omit to keep the procedural coconut.

art_wall.name: Wall tile sprite
art_wall.description: Override the maze wall tile. Omit to keep the procedural leafy hedge.

audio_default.name: Sound default
audio_default.description: Whether sound effects start on or muted (the player can still toggle). Defaults to on.

sfx_start.name: Start sound
sfx_start.description: Override the round-start sound effect. Omit to keep the default.

sfx_eat.name: Eat sound
sfx_eat.description: Override the eat-a-banana sound effect. Omit to keep the default.

sfx_power.name: Power sound
sfx_power.description: Override the eat-a-coconut (power) sound effect. Omit to keep the default.

sfx_eaten.name: Chaser-eaten sound
sfx_eaten.description: Override the eat-a-chaser sound effect. Omit to keep the default.

sfx_caught.name: Caught sound
sfx_caught.description: Override the caught sound effect. Omit to keep the default.

sfx_win.name: Win sound
sfx_win.description: Override the win sound effect. Omit to keep the default.

fg.name: Foreground
fg.description: HUD text and on-screen control glyphs.

button_bg.name: Primary button bg
button_bg.description: Background of the Start / Play again button.

focus_ring.name: Focus ring
focus_ring.description: Keyboard focus outline on buttons and controls.
